title: Christmas Decoration 6 Pack Plastic Twisted Candy Canes Red & White
features: Pack of 6 red and white candy canes
description: Add a fun element to your Christmas tree or display with these fabulous red and white plastic candy canes. These candy canes will be perfect for all kinds of festive displays, whether that's a shop window, a Christmas party table piece or even hung up on the Christmas tree. They'll be a great festive addition to your displays over the Christmas period and will bring some festive cheer as well. Designed in traditional red and white colours, these candy canes are bound to stand out and can be reused year after year as a unique festive decoration.
